use_cases: Displaying and editing tabular data in a spreadsheet-like interface with familiar Excel interactions
Performing range selections with shift+click for bulk data operations
Editing individual cells via double-click with inline input editing
Drag-to-fill cells to quickly populate data across rows or columns
Integrating into data-heavy dashboards or admin interfaces requiring tabular data management
ai_summary: An interactive Excel-style table component with spreadsheet-like functionality including cell selection, range selection via shift+click, inline cell editing on double-click, and drag-to-fill behavior. Built with React and framer-motion for smooth animations, supporting both editable and read-only modes with toast notifications for user feedback. Ideal for SaaS applications, data dashboards, or any interface requiring spreadsheet-style data manipulation and display.
